title: angry birds ear meme parrot
description: the packs adds hand to the parrot head, like a meme with an angry bird with a human ear and a human hand
body:
**optifine/emf+etf mods required**  
this simple resource pack adds a hand to the parrots head model from that one angry bird meme  
this is a part of the joke resource packs
![angry bird ear meme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87e11bfd167dec451c6a5cc88492de23efb64946_0.webp)
